metadata.dataSource: Web research via Booking.com, Airbnb, Google Maps, travel guides
metadata.notes: Accommodations for first 6 locations of 12-location Chile road trip. Focus on apartments/cabañas with kitchen, WiFi, and parking. Part 2 will cover remaining 6 locations.
